do_now: Clean the wound with clean water immediately
Give paracetamol for fever — do NOT give aspirin
Keep the patient lying down and calm
do_not: Do not apply ice directly on wound
Do not squeeze or press the wound
Do not give food or water if surgery may be needed
Do not remove any embedded objects
red_flags: Red streaks spreading from the wound

emergency.dispatcher_script: I have a medical emergency. The patient is a 45 year old male with a severely infected leg wound and high fever. The patient is conscious but very weak. My location is near Dhangaon village on the Pune highway. Please send an ambulance immediately.

disclaimer: This is first-aid guidance only, not a medical diagnosis. Always consult a doctor when possible.
